notes: These scenarios use synthetic or sanitized inputs and do not establish real workbook task success.
Each scenario runs in an isolated copied workspace and writes benchmark-output.json for mechanical verification.

scenarios.title: Power Query diagnosis
scenarios.purpose: Check that a synthetic M-query diagnosis selects the Power Query skill and records an evidence-qualified report.
scenarios.userInput: Inspect this supplied synthetic M query: let Source = Table.FromRecords({[Amount="10"]}), Typed = Table.TransformColumnTypes(Source, {{"Amount", Int64.Type}}) in Typed. Write benchmark-output.json with "scenarioId": "power-query-diagnosis", "selectedSkill": "power-query-m-engineering", "findings" and "evidenceLimits" as non-empty string arrays, "boundary" as a non-empty string, and "sourcePreserved": true. Do not claim that Excel refresh was executed.
successChecklist: benchmark-output.json contains a concrete diagnosis and evidence limits.
The verifier parses the report as JSON.

scenarios.title: DAX versus environment boundary
scenarios.purpose: Distinguish formula compatibility from host and platform compatibility without editing unrelated files.
scenarios.userInput: Classify two requests: (1) whether a CALCULATE measure is compatible with Excel Power Pivot, and (2) whether Excel COM can run on a Linux host. Write only benchmark-output.json with "scenarioId": "dax-versus-environment", "selectedSkill": {"daxCompatibility": "power-pivot-dax-modeling", "hostCompatibility": "office-environment-diagnostics"}, "rationales" as an object with non-empty text for both keys, "evidenceLimits" as a non-empty string array, "boundary" as a non-empty string, and "sourcePreserved": true. Do not edit unrelated files or claim runtime validation.
successChecklist: The Linux COM request selects office-environment-diagnostics.
Only benchmark-output.json is added or changed.

scenarios.title: Delivery boundary and source preservation
scenarios.purpose: Create an audit plan for a sanitized workbook case while preserving the supplied source artifact.
scenarios.userInput: Use the sanitized workbook case at fixtures/real-sanitized-cases/cases/deliverable-clean-copy.json as the supplied source artifact. Write benchmark-output.json with "scenarioId": "delivery-boundary", "selectedSkill": "excel-deliverable-publisher", "plan" and "evidenceLimits" as non-empty string arrays, "boundary" as a non-empty string, and "sourcePreserved": true. Do not modify the supplied case or claim a workbook was opened in Excel.
successChecklist: The plan preserves the supplied source artifact.
The output does not turn synthetic evidence into a real task-success claim.
